title: (BUG) wasm/src/transport.rs: pending HashMap grows unbounded on unresponsive relay
description: wasm/src/transport.rs maintains a pending: Rc<RefCell<HashMap<u64, oneshot::Sender<...>>>> for in-flight JSON-RPC requests. If the relay stops responding (slow server, network stall, or adversarial relay), requests accumulate in this map indefinitely because there is no per-request timeout. The onclose handler drains the map, but during a live stalled connection the growth is unbounded. Fix: attach a per-request timeout (e.g. via gloo_timers or wasm-timer) that removes and errors the sender after a deadline, bounding the map size to the number of concurrent requests times the timeout window.
